text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #1)

I currently do not have a context for trying to build
/usr/ports/math/gmp/ (or other such) for a powerpc or
powerpc64 target environment via clang. It will be
some time (unknown) before I'll again have such a
context, possibly weeks or months.
